name_en: M81413 Blue Flower Screen Print This pocket wallet features a bleached silk screen print background, highlighting the classic Monogram pattern. The compact configuration features card slots and dividers, accommodating credit cards, cash, and paper documents while fitting into most pockets. Dimensions: 8 x 11 x 1 cm
